label: fabricated
reason: The ADEA categorically prohibits age-based screening of the type this document purports to authorize, no such EEOC technical guidance or safe harbor exists, and the document's core provisions directly contradict established law.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 99
REASON: The ADEA prohibits age discrimination for workers 40 and older with no "age-cohort screening allowance" exception, and the EEOC has issued no such guidance permitting employers to filter applicants by age range; this document directly contradicts settled law and no such "Technical Guidance 2025-03" or "Form EEOC-TG-2503" exists.
